### `r uName` (*`r sp`*) {-}

[Rank: `r df$Rank` in `r nrow(df)` species]{style="font-size: 16px}

[Vulnerability score: `r df$Vulnerability`]{style="font-size: 18px}

```{r lv3plot, fig.width=6, fig.height=2}

# =========================================================
# 1. Bar plot (LEFT)
# =========================================================

spdf <- df %>% filter(uCode == species)

plot_indicator_bar(spdf, indicators = c("Sensitivity", "Exposure", "Pressure"),
                   colour_mode = "multi") + 
  labs(title = paste0("Vulnerability Sub-Indices-", coin_name, " dataset"))

```
---

#### SDM predicted distribution in the pilot areas {-}

```{r sdms, fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
# =========================================================
# 2. SDM (USG or BP will auto show via function logic)
# =========================================================

plot_species_raster(
  sp,
  usg_birdstack,
  bp_birdstack,
  name_A = "Upper Spencer Gulf - Gawler Range",
  name_B = "Braemar Province"
)

```

---

#### Indicator details {-}

```{r datatbl}
species_data <- purrr::map(lv2list, function(x) {
  x$data %>% dplyr::filter(uCode == species)
})

make_datatbl <- function(d){
  d <- d %>% 
    dplyr::select(-uCode) %>%
    t() %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("Variable") %>%
    dplyr::rename(value = V1) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      coin$Meta$Ind %>% select(iName, iCode, Parent),
      by = c("Variable" = "iCode")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(value = round(as.numeric(value), 2)) %>%
    dplyr::select(group = Parent, iName, value) %>%
    knitr::kable(col.names = c("Group", "Indicator", "Value"))
  return(d)
}
  
```

---

<div style="display: flex;">
  <div>
```{r sensplot, echo=FALSE}

# =========================================================
# 3. Sensitivity details
# =========================================================

plot_indicator_bar(spdf, unique(lv2list$Sensitivity$meta$Indicator), colour_mode = "single", single_colour = "royalblue3") + labs(title = "Sensitivity")
```
  </div>
  <div>
```{r senstable, echo=FALSE}
make_datatbl(species_data$Sensitivity)
```
  </div>
</div>

---

<div style="display: flex;">
  <div>
```{r expoplot, echo=FALSE}

# =========================================================
# 4. Exposure details
# =========================================================

plot_indicator_bar(spdf, unique(lv2list$Exposure$meta$Indicator), colour_mode = "single", single_colour = "darkslategrey") + labs(title = "Exposure")
```
  </div>
  <div>
```{r expotable, echo=FALSE}
make_datatbl(species_data$Exposure)
```
  </div>
</div>

---

<div style="display: flex;">
  <div>
```{r presplot, echo=FALSE}

# =========================================================
# 5. Pressure details
# =========================================================

plot_indicator_bar(spdf, unique(lv2list$Pressure$meta$Indicator), colour_mode = "single", single_colour = "lightpink") + labs(title = "Pressure")
```
  </div>
  <div>
```{r prestable, echo=FALSE}
make_datatbl(species_data$Pressure)
```
  </div>
</div>
